title: Goety: gotta summon em all!
description: This is an advanced summoning addon for the Goety mod that introduces unique summoning focuses while ensuring smooth compatibility with other mods. In its current version, the addon primarily implements dedicated summoning spells for undead mobs from Born
body:
This is an advanced summoning addon for the Goety mod that introduces unique summoning focuses while ensuring smooth compatibility with other mods. In its current version, the addon primarily implements dedicated summoning spells for undead mobs from Born In Chaos, expanding your arsenal of allies and foes.

Now the dark wand and the staves can have affixes that influence spellcasting, also, they support gems, but a dedicated datapack is needed: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/goety-apotheosis-compatdatapack


The new focuses allow you to summon:

Summoned Mobs:  
• Skeleton Thrasher  
• Fallen Chaos Knight  
• Lifestealer ( Lifestealer Servant will also grant you Dark Ward every 10 seconds if you are close to it)  
• Zombies from Born In Chaos (e.g., Zombie Clown)  
  
Summoning Horse Focuses:  
• Skeleton Horse  
• Riding Felsteed  
• Riding Lord Felsteed  

 

While Goety is a mandatory dependency, Born in Chaos is not, but without it, at the moment, the mod will just add the summon skeleton horse focus.

For crafting recipes, use JEI.
I will add them to the Goety guidebook later on in development.
